description: A tiny pink wheeled scout companion robot with twin warm searchlight eyes and a pink baseball cap.

idle.notes: Stable companion idle with gentle lamp-eye breathing glow and tiny body bob.

walk.notes: Directional wheel-roll rows used for roll_right, roll_left, and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Observant pause with brighter lamp eyes and a small head-body tilt.

happy.notes: Restrained pleased response with tiny uplift and brighter lamp eyes.

sleep.notes: Low-power resting loop with dimmer lamps and relaxed chassis posture.

active.notes: Gentle active monitoring loop kept as a support state.

hop.notes: Small buoyant suspension hop and settle.

melancholy.notes: Tender low-power droop without damage or panic.

drag.notes: Directional drag reuses the true-facing wheel-roll rows.

active_support.notes: Extra support loop retained to complete the fixed atlas.

hop_support.notes: Extra support loop retained to complete the fixed atlas.

low_power_support.notes: Extra support loop retained to complete the fixed atlas.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses the true left-facing wheel-roll row
right drag uses the true right-facing wheel-roll row
roll_left and roll_right are not swapped
lamp eyes, central sensor, cap brim, chassis, and wheel direction all agree with travel direction
Spot remains readable at small size as a capped twin-headlamp wheeled robot
